slots.meaning: The whole realm the succession crisis is set in.
slots.guidance: A single named country/domain whose throne is contested; distinct from the capital and the river.

slots.meaning: The seat city where the old king died and the will is read.
slots.guidance: The realm's capital/seat of power; the grey house's home ground.

slots.meaning: The river running through the realm, the site of the drowned crossing.
slots.guidance: A single named waterway; the green house's constituency lives along it.

slots.meaning: The dead king whose succession opens the story.
slots.guidance: A named, titled monarch who has just died, leaving a child heir; referenced once at the opening, never on stage.

slots.meaning: The ruling dynasty the child heir belongs to.
slots.guidance: The royal house name, distinct from the three contending houses.

slots.meaning: The child heir whose safety and throne every branch ultimately turns on.
slots.guidance: A named young heir (age nine, kept fixed); never harmed on the page; the stakes every house is really playing for.

slots.meaning: The royal house's own emblem, used to name the throne's keep, its truce feast, and its assembly hall.
slots.guidance: A single benign emblem word (a bird, beast, or device) that reads naturally as 'gold {ROYAL_SIGIL}' and as part of a place name.

slots.meaning: The river crossing/crisis that all three houses' vantages reference: the fords a house floods to deny a border army.
slots.guidance: A single named crossing or chokepoint; the site of the year's first, and worst-kept, secret.

slots.meaning: The grey house's guard captain, referenced from both the grey and green vantages.
slots.guidance: A named, loyal officer; the one who ultimately carries out the drowning order.

slots.meaning: The distant muster point where the red house secretly buys an army under the truce.
slots.guidance: A named, out-of-the-way place; distinct from the drowned crossing near the capital.

slots.meaning: The grey house's head, the regent-Steward the hero pages for.
slots.guidance: A surname used constantly as his referential name; an old, exact, dutiful guardian.

slots.meaning: The grey leader's given name, used alongside the surname at introduction.
slots.guidance: A single given name.

slots.meaning: The grey leader's office/title, used throughout as a name-substitute ('the Steward').
slots.guidance: A single formal office title implying stewardship/regency, distinct from the other two houses' titles.

slots.meaning: The grey house's banner color.
slots.guidance: A single color word, distinct from the other two houses' colors.

slots.meaning: The grey house's banner beast.
slots.guidance: A single benign animal/emblem word, distinct from the other two houses' sigils.

slots.meaning: The hero's post in the grey house (Steward's household).
slots.guidance: A junior, trusted household post; distinct from the hero's post in the other two houses.

slots.meaning: The red house's head, the border Duke the hero serves as herald.
slots.guidance: A surname used constantly as his referential name; charming, generous, ambitious, never idle.

slots.meaning: The red leader's given name, used alongside the surname at introduction.
slots.guidance: A single given name.

slots.meaning: The red leader's office/title, used throughout as a name-substitute ('the Duke').
slots.guidance: A single formal title implying martial/border authority, distinct from the other two houses' titles.

slots.meaning: The red house's banner color.
slots.guidance: A single color word, distinct from the other two houses' colors.

slots.meaning: The red house's banner beast.
slots.guidance: A single benign animal/emblem word, distinct from the other two houses' sigils.

slots.meaning: The hero's post in the red house (the Duke's confidential messenger).
slots.guidance: A trusted messenger/envoy post that carries words and secrets its master would not commit to any other hand.

slots.meaning: The red house's border stronghold, where the captured heir is held and the siege plays out.
slots.guidance: A single named fortress, distinct from the capital and every other named place.

slots.meaning: The green house's head, the chancery Lady the hero scribes for.
slots.guidance: A surname used constantly as her referential name; plain-spoken, patient, trusts proof over the sword.

slots.meaning: The green leader's given name, used alongside the surname at introduction.
slots.guidance: A single given name.

slots.meaning: The green leader's honorific, used throughout as a name-substitute ('the Lady').
slots.guidance: A single formal honorific, distinct from the other two houses' titles.

slots.meaning: The green house's banner color.
slots.guidance: A single color word, distinct from the other two houses' colors.

slots.meaning: The green house's banner emblem.
slots.guidance: A single benign plant/emblem word, distinct from the other two houses' sigils.

slots.meaning: The hero's post in the green house (the chancery's youngest scribe).
slots.guidance: A junior clerical/record-keeping post; distinct from the hero's post in the other two houses.

slots.meaning: The river-city where the green house's chancery is seated.
slots.guidance: A single named town/city along the river, distinct from the capital and every other named place.
